overrides.C0684:
<?php
// C0684 · CRUD JSON (Slim 4)
$items = []; $seq = 1;

$app->get('/items', function(Request $req, Response $res) use (&$items): Response {
  $res->getBody()->write(json_encode(array_values($items)));
  return $res->withHeader('Content-Type','application/json');
});

$app->post('/items', function(Request $req, Response $res) use (&$items, &$seq): Response {
  $data = json_decode((string)$req->getBody(), true) ?? [];
  $it = ['id'=>$seq++, 'name'=>(string)($data['name']??'')];
  $items[$it['id']] = $it;
  $res->getBody()->write(json_encode($it));
  return $res->withHeader('Content-Type','application/json')->withStatus(201);
});
overrides.C0685:
<?php
// C0685 · Middleware logging + timing
$app->add(function(Request $req, $handler) {
  $t0 = microtime(true);
  $res = $handler->handle($req);
  error_log($req->getMethod().' '.$req->getUri()->getPath().' '.round((microtime(true)-$t0)*1000).'ms');
  return $res;
});
